name: Cosine Similarity
description: Computes cosine similarity between NEW and OLD entities using encoded and scaled feature vectors.
input: Takes a DataFrame containing categorical and numeric feature columns.
output: Returns top-K most similar OLD records for each NEW record.

fields.name: categorical_cols
fields.title: Categorical Columns
fields.description: Categorical feature columns used for similarity computation. These columns are indexed and one-hot encoded.

fields.name: numeric_cols
fields.title: Numeric Columns
fields.description: Numeric feature columns used for similarity computation. These columns are assembled and scaled.

fields.name: new_id_col
fields.title: NEW ID Column
fields.description: Unique identifier column for NEW records.

fields.name: old_id_col
fields.title: OLD ID Column
fields.description: Unique identifier column for OLD records.

fields.name: status_col
fields.title: Status Column
fields.description: Column used to differentiate between OLD and NEW records.

fields.name: old_value
fields.title: OLD Status Value
fields.description: Value in the status column that identifies OLD records.

fields.name: new_value
fields.title: NEW Status Value
fields.description: Value in the status column that identifies NEW records.

fields.name: top_k
fields.title: Top K Matches
fields.description: Number of most similar OLD records to return for each NEW record.
